operational_knowledge_units.title: Go-to function can send an idle AGV to a selected square
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that an AGV not currently in a task can be sent to any square using the Go-to function.
observed_evidence: Slide text: 'An AGV not in a task can be sent to any square.'
Numbered UI actions on the slide reference selecting an AGV, Go to, a square, and Confirm.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Robot Selection Go-to function behavior: an AGV not in a task can be sent to any square. The UI sequence shown is Select an AGV, Select Go to, Select which square you want the AGV to go to, Select Confirm.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Go-to function is used for quick recovery when an AGV must be moved to hospital
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide presents a recovery scenario where if a tipper goes down and an AGV will not leave, the AGV can be removed and added again, then the Go-to function can be used to drop it off at the hospital.
observed_evidence: Slide text: 'This is helpful when trying to recover quickly.'
Slide text: 'Example if a Tipper goes down and an AGV will not leave.'
Slide text: 'You can remove and add the agv and use the go to function to drop it off at the hospital.'

relationships.target: Tipper goes down and AGV will not leave

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Recovery use of Robot Selection Go-to function: when a tipper goes down and an AGV will not leave, the slide says you can remove and add the AGV and use the Go-to function to drop it off at the hospital.

operational_knowledge_units.title: AGV resumes by picking up a new task after its tote is removed
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that after the AGV is dropped off, it will pick up a new task once its tote has been removed.
observed_evidence: Slide text: 'The AGV will pickup a new task once it’s tote has been removed'

relationships.target: AGV picks up a new task

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: AGV task resumption behavior: the slide says the AGV will pick up a new task once its tote has been removed.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Go-to function UI sequence in Robot Selection
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide identifies the visible UI interaction sequence for sending an AGV to a square: select an AGV, select Go to, choose the destination square, and confirm.
observed_evidence: Slide numbered list: '1. Select an AGV'
Slide numbered list: '2. Select Go to'
Slide numbered list: '3. Select which square you want the AGV to go to'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Robot Selection Go-to UI concept: select an AGV, select Go to, select which square you want the AGV to go to, then select Confirm.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Send an idle AGV to a selected square using Go-to
preconditions: AGV is not in a task
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide titled 'Robot Selection / Go-to function' with numbered UI actions for selecting an AGV, selecting Go to, choosing a square, and confirming.

steps.expected_outcome: An AGV is chosen for the Go-to action.
steps.validation_check: The target AGV is selected in the Robot Selection UI.
steps.visual_region_hint: Numbered step 1 area on the slide; Robot Selection action list.

steps.expected_outcome: The Go-to function is initiated for the selected AGV.
steps.validation_check: The Go to option is chosen for the AGV.
steps.visual_region_hint: Numbered step 2 area on the slide; Go to action in the Robot Selection UI.

steps.instruction: Select which square you want the AGV to go to.
steps.expected_outcome: A destination square is chosen for the AGV.
steps.visual_region_hint: Numbered step 3 area on the slide; destination square selection.

steps.expected_outcome: The Go-to command is submitted for the selected AGV and square.
steps.visual_region_hint: Numbered step 4 area on the slide; confirm action.

warnings: The slide states this applies to an AGV not in a task.
The slide provides a recovery example, but does not give a complete remove/add AGV procedure.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Procedure candidate for Robot Selection Go-to function: for an AGV not in a task, select an AGV, select Go to, select which square you want the AGV to go to, and select Confirm.
